scripts.clean:web: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p='apps/web/.next';if(fs.existsSync(p))fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('clean:web: removed apps/web/.next (if it existed). If edge ENOENT persists, use npm run dev:web:webpack. On Windows, exclude that path from real-time scan/sync.')"
scripts.verify: python -m pytest testing_suite apps/server/tests packages/ai-core/tests -q --tb=line && python testing_suite/verify_no_api_keys.py && npm run format:web && npm run lint:web && npm run build:web
